title: × neotinorchis razzarae
intro: × Neotinorchis razzarae is a rare, hybrid species of orchid plant, resulting from the cross between a Neotinea ustulata and an Orchis razzarae. Traditionally, the × Neotinorchis razzarae plant has been used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of this plant are said to include relief from digestive issues, reduced inflammation, and improved wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
